name: ios-firebase-project
description: A developer working on an iOS app with Firebase authentication

notes: Simulates a mobile developer context. Recommender should surface iOS and auth skills.

name: devops-kubernetes

name: content-creator

write email sequence for product launch

notes: Simulates a non-developer content creation context. Tests domain coverage for marketing use cases.
